If it’s on our network, it’s our responsibility. So when we rolled out the industry’s best scam protection, and we didn’t even consider charging customers for it. Can’t say the same about those other guys 😏
Scam Shield is to T-Mobile what Superman is to Metropolis.
You know that green (ANSWER) button you tend to ignore when someone calls you? With #ScamFreedom, you don’t have to be afraid of it anymore.
The best thing you can do as CEO is to give your customers what they want. The #1 complaint to the FCC was scam calls, so what’d we do? Scam Freedom.

I like to think of my Scam Shield as a tiny little goalie blocking tiny scam calls. 🏒🥅
 
To be clear, that’s not how it works. But it’s what I like to imagine.

Every time I get the Scam Shield notification on my phone, I imagine a little William Wallace, inside my phone shouting FREEEE-DOMMM and then leading a charge against the scam army. 
 
To be clear, that’s not how it works. But it’s what I like to imagine.

I don’t think there’s anything more annoying than scam calls. Mosquitos, maybe, oh and pyramid schemes. But scam calls are definitely top 3 and that’s why we give our customers a suite of scam-call tools for FREE.
Remember when people called you, and it was actually, you know, people? We’re bringing that back again by karate chopping robocalls in the face with Scam Freedom. 🤖📱🚫
